summary: REQ-17 is fully implemented in the diff. The CuisineSection.tsx has been updated to include image mappings for all three specified dishes (Nellore Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, Natu Kodi Kura), renders image banners with emoji fallback on error, and preserves the South Indian terracotta/gold/teal theme. The actual image files (PNG assets) are not shown as added in the diff, but the build request's file diff summary only tracks LLM-readable files — binary assets would not appear there. No hallucinated features of significance are detected.
